setup_needed: [Setup] playwright or Chromium not found. Starting installation...
setup_err_pip_not_found: pip not found. Please reinstall Python or install pip manually.
setup_err_playwright_failed:
playwright installation failed.
  Check your network or install manually:
  pip install playwright
setup_chromium_installing: → Not installed. Starting installation... (hundreds of MB, may take a while)
setup_err_chromium_failed:
Chromium installation failed.
  Check your network or run manually:
  playwright install chromium
setup_all_done: All set! You can now run run.bat.
sched_header: ZZZ HoyoLab Check-in - Task Scheduler Registration
sched_menu_description: Registers a Windows Task Scheduler entry to run the check-in automatically every day.
sched_menu_option_register: 1. Register   - Set up daily auto check-in
sched_recommend_time_note: HoyoLab resets at UTC+8 midnight, so 01:05 KST or later is recommended.
title: Zenless Zone Zero Auto Check-in
sched_ask: Register daily auto-run in Task Scheduler? (y/N):
sched_note: [Note] Runs only when PC is on and user is logged in.
sched_skip: [Info] You can set it up later with schedule.bat.
check_fail:
[Fail] Check-in did not complete.
       Reason: No completion signal after click (server error or network issue)
login_guide1: [Info] Browser opening. Please log in to HoyoLab.
login_no_close: [Info] Do not close the browser until login is complete!
login_fail:
[Fail] Login failed 3 times.
  Please restart the script.
relogin: [Relogin] Opening browser to log in again...
final_fail:
[Final Failure] Could not complete check-in.
  Possible causes:
    1. Network     → Check internet connection
    2. Server error → Retry manually later
session_err: Login check failed — session expired or page load error
